subject: A war-torn city of Ravnica overgrown with vines and verdant foliage, lit by a sunset sky with a massive looming structure on the horizon
description: A wide vista of ruined urban architecture being reclaimed by lush green growth. Crumbling stone walls, archways, and toppled columns are draped in heavy vines and tropical leaves in the foreground. A central path or causeway winds back through the overgrowth toward distant silhouetted buildings. The sky burns orange and pink with sunset light, and an enormous monolithic structure looms on the far horizon, suggesting the Bolas-era War of the Spark cityscape. The mood is elegiac — nature swallowing the wreckage of a fallen civilization.
foreground: ruined stone arches and walls smothered in heavy green vines and broad tropical leaves
background: silhouetted city skyline and a colossal monolithic tower beneath a sunset sky
